updateClient(bytes,uint256,uint256).details: Adds an appHash to the internal store, after verifying the client update proof associated with the light client implementation.

params.appHash: App hash (state root) to be verified
params.proof: A generic byte array that contains proof data to prove the apphash client update. This can differ depending on the light client type. E.g. this can be an abi.encoded struct which contains an OpL2StateProof and L1Block from the IProofVerifier interface.
